license_note: Confirmed via CrossRef DOI metadata: dx.doi.org/10.17504/protocols.io.wjrfcm6
title: Retrograde labeling of brown adipose tissue (BAT)-projecting sympathetic neurons with cholera toxin B (CTB)
author: Seoeun Lee

steps_raw.instruction: Anesthetize the animal with isoflurane, and keep it anesthetized for the whole procedure
Once animal is unconscious (check with toe pinch), place it on heating pad and lubricate the eyes with ophthalamic ointment
Inject buprenorphine (100 µl/ 10 µg) on the surgical site for analgesia
Remove the hair of interscapular region
Scrub the surgical area using povidone-iodine and 70% isopropyl alcohol, 3 times each
Open the sterilized pouch with tools, put the suture on the sterile space (save the plastic cover for CTB drops), uncover the sterile draping, place on the sterile space
Prepare CTB in syringe (10 ul for each depot), put on sterile gloves *Alternatively, 1-2 ul of less volume can be injected using Hamilton syringe or mouth pipette with a pulled glass needle
Cut the sterile draping to make a hole that has a size of the operating site
Make a shallow incision at the center of the shaved area (1 cm below the head) and extend about 0.5 cm bilaterally
Grasp the adipose tissue of one side, locate BAT inside and inject the CTB solution
Repeat the same injection on the opposite side to complete the bilateral injection
Gently put back the fat pad and close the wound with a 4-0 PS-4 suture
Wipe the closed surgical wound with Povidone-iodine and alcohol prep
Inject buprenorphine or appropriate analgesics every 4-12 hours after thesurgery for 48 hours
Sacrifice the animals 3 days after the injection, dissect out stellate ganglia (SG) on a slide with cold PBS
Dilute CTB in saline to make 1% stock solution: 500 ug CTB powder in 50 ul saline
Aliquot 4 ul of 1% CTB solution to each bottle and store it at -20ºC

When ready to use, take out the frozen CTB solution and adjust with more saline to final volume desired (ex. add 16 ul of saline each bottle to get 20 ul of total solution, which will be injected 10 ul to each depot)
Fix the dissected SG in 4% PFA in 0.1M PB for 1 hour and wash with PBS overnight at 4ºC
Attach an iSpacer on a slide glass, carefully locate the SG inside the spacer (best to stretch SG horizontally for imaging) and mount with Vectashield (~110 ul) and a cover slip
SG was imaged with Zeiss confocal 710 using tile scan and z-stack options.
